creator: ksenux@ukr.net
text:
I have installed samba-3.0.23d,1, kerberos port is heimdal-0.7.2_2. 
When i try build new samba-3.0.24,1 then get this error:

Compiling dynconfig.c
In file included from /usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.24/source/dynconfig.c:21:
include/includes.h:1480: error: conflicting types for 'krb5_set_real_time'
/usr/local/include/krb5-protos.h:2834: error: previous declaration of 'krb5_set_real_time' was here
include/includes.h:1480: error: conflicting types for 'krb5_set_real_time'
/usr/local/include/krb5-protos.h:2834: error: previous declaration of 'krb5_set_real_time' was here
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/samba3/work/samba-3.0.24/source.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/samba3.

How-To-Repeat: Build samba-3.0.23d,1 on amd64 with heimdal-0.7.2_2
